question: The line chart shows site visits by year from 2018 to 2020. Which of the following statements is best supported by the chart?

options.A: 2020 has the highest number of visits among the years shown.
options.B: Visits remained roughly constant from 2018 to 2020.
options.C: We cannot tell whether 2020 has more visits than 2019 because the top of the line is cut off.
options.D: Visits in 2018 were higher than in 2020.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bars are truncated and looks identical.
